stories.headline: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce need a first dance song. We asked celebrities to pick one. - Yahoo
stories.summary: What should Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce dance to at their wedding? Celebrities picked everything from "Enchanted" to "The Thong Song."

stories.headline: Live updates: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s multi-day wedding celebration is underway - CNN
stories.summary: An event believed to be the rehearsal dinner for the couple kicked off Swift and Kelce’s wedding festivities ahead of Friday’s big celebration, according to people familiar with the planning.

stories.headline: Trump White House’s Taylor Swift Stunt Enters Its ‘So F**king Cringe’ Era - HuffPost
stories.summary: The White House's "America's Eras Tour" post backfired.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce donate $1M to food bank serving Berks, Schuylkill - WFMZ.com
stories.summary: The bank says Swift has a history of supporting organizations that work to combat food insecurity.

stories.headline: Madonna’s Dance Floor-Dominating ‘Confessions II’ Is Her Best Album in Decades: Album Review - Variety
stories.summary: Madonna reunites with Stuart Price for 'Confessions II,' her best album since releasing its predecessor in 2005.

stories.headline: Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds flee NYC ahead of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding extravaganza - Page Six
stories.summary: Page Six reported that the “Gossip Girl” alum was not invited to the pop star’s celeb-filled nuptials after their fallout.

stories.headline: America Has Two Options at the Box Office This Fourth of July Weekend. The Choice Is Clear. - Slate Magazine
stories.summary: Two new movies promise to tell a tale of the history of the United States. Only one truly captures it.
